title: Safety Inspection Report Template
scenario: Create a safety inspection report template for a manufacturing facility. The template should include a description of the facility's safety hazards, instructions for conducting a safety inspection, and guidelines for reporting and addressing safety concerns. The template should be written in a clear and concise manner, using simple language and diagrams. The template should be no more than 250 words and assume a manufacturing facility with a staff of 100.
constraints: Must be no more than 250 words
Must use diagrams to illustrate conducting a safety inspection

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the template adheres to the word count and diagram constraints.
Check if the template is written in a clear and concise manner, using simple language.
Check if the template includes accurate and relevant information about safety hazards, conducting a safety inspection, and reporting and addressing safety concerns.
